name: components/toggle-group
description: A set of mutually exclusive or multiple toggle buttons grouped together with shared styling and borders. Inherits toggle-button variants (default, outline) and sizes (sm, default, lg) via context, automatically removing internal double-borders and rounding only the outer corners. Built on Kobalte ToggleGroup and composed of ToggleGroup and ToggleGroupItem primitives.
useCases: Text-alignment controls (Left, Center, Right, Justify) in rich-text editors
View-density selectors (Compact, Comfortable, Spacious) in data-table toolbars
Filter chip groups where one or more categories can be toggled on a search page
Segmented tool palettes in design or diagramming applications
